ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2001 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- Defendant SNDRA BEAR's motion for reconsideration of motion to set aside default denied. Requirements of CCP 1008 not satisfied. Facts presented not new or different facts. (AJR)SL Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780

Deft Sandra Bear'S Mtn To Set Aside Default & Default Judgt/Memo Of P&A In Supp Of Setting Aside Default & Deflt Judgt, Calendar Motion: Set Aside, Calendar Motion: Default, Calendar Motion: Default, Calendar Motion: Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-01-2001 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: John P. Hurabiell, Esq. of HUPPERT & HURABIELL 387-3001 for Plaintiff and opposing party
No appearance by Defendant and moving party
Mr. Hurabiell provided the court with a copy of his opposition papers. Clerk checked the Register of Actions which reflects that opposition was filed on October 19th. Matter taken under submission.
At the end of the calendar, Anthony D. Agpaoa, Esq. 989-1476 appeared and was informed that the matter was under submission. Joseph Vickstein CSR 4780.
